message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame nlargest + nsmallest (2)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame top-N selection:

- nlargest_n_3: 5-row frame, return 3 rows with highest "score"
- nsmallest_n_2: 4-row frame, return 2 rows with lowest "price"

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.nlargest(n, columns=col) / .nsmallest(n, columns=col)),
runs the Rust DataFrame.nlargest(n, col) / .nsmallest(n, col), and
asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameNlargest /
DataFrameNsmallest were already wired through the Frame response
branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-nccsr]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
